title: Tales
description: This A Minecraft Plus ModPack Includes the mods OmarFive use
body:
# Tales ☕
Is a modpack that has a full immersive experince of the TRUE minecraft vipe! 
With specific mods and texture packs it gives minecraft that lively feel we wish for! 

# Animatied grass and leaves!!
![Fill your world with life with this amazing view!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66dc5fdbf0e3a5d6ebc76ec0945971e8504ce78.gif)

# Voxy and custom terrain genration !
![Crazy view distance !!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d42021297a69bfd7887d65656996f1f575c44cdc.png)

Five Kingdoms isn't just a modpack—it's a full-on experience that lets you live the true vibe of a survival game. A lively and unique world can feel empty, but with this modpack, there will never be a boring moment.

This modpack includes 2 texture packs from : https://vanillatweaks.net/
